name: Mohamed Nabeel
title: AI Security Researcher
tagline: Building autonomous agents and adversarial ML systems to detect, classify, and neutralize AI-powered cyber threats at scale.
bio: AI Security Researcher focused on the intersection of machine learning and cybersecurity. My work spans building autonomous threat intelligence agents, developing adversarial ML defenses, and pioneering methods to detect GenAI-generated malware and abuse. I apply large language models and graph neural networks to real-world security problems, with research published at VirusBulletin, DEFCON, and [Un]prompted.
